title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
